commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a default-off Telegram interleaved progress preview mode with config/schema/docs metadata, Telegram renderer/dispatch wiring, CLI JSONL paragraph-break handling, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +747, Tests +596, Docs +2, Generated 0. Total +1345 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction for the review finding: a fresh non-prefix fragment like body `alpha` plus next text `and beta` reaches the one-character tail/prefix fold and drops the leading `a`. Live Telegram behavior still needs current-head proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human/contributor follow-up is needed because the PR has a narrow source bug, stale current-head Telegram proof, and config/message-delivery surfaces maintainers must accept.
